rulings.Case Title: CHARLES MCPEEK VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Jeffrey Ramirez dbs Travis Auto Parts and Martin W. Moore, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court¿s own motion to June 20, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. For over three years it has been the policy and practice of this Department to not allow motions to be calendared or heard on Mondays. However, the court will entertain this motion due to the court¿s inadvertent acceptance of this filing. = (503/TLJ)
